ИСТИНА
Luxury villa projects in Dubai can sit idle for 3–6 months waiting for modification permits and NOCs — killing your timeline and margins. ArchiStruct handles all structural, MEP, and architectural documentation plus the complete approval chain with Dubai Municipality, DDA, Trakhees, and community management. We launched Atlantis The Royal in 3 days vs. the standard 3–6 weeks, with 100+ approved projects in Dubai and fixed pricing from day one. Would you be open to a 10-minute call to discuss fast-track permits for Select Group's next development?

UAE approvals for killa design projects
ИСТИНАInternational studios entering Dubai often spend months navigating municipal approvals without a local engineering partner — projects stall before construction even starts.

ArchiStruct manages the full approval chain with Dubai Municipality, DDA, Trakhees, and community management, so your team focuses on design, not bureaucracy.

We helped the Atlantis The Royal project launch in 3 days instead of 3–6 weeks, with 100+ approved projects across Dubai to date.

Would you be open to a 10-minute call to see how we could support Killa Design's UAE projects?		UAE approvals for killa design projects

agent thank you for your message. it has been sent. media & events blogs the loop dubai a sustainable future of urban mobility blogs the loop dubai a sustainable future of urban mobility dubai continues to set global benchmarks in innovation and sustainability with the launch of the loop a revolutionary 93 km sustainable urban highway designed exclusively for cyclists, joggers, and e-scooter users. fully climate-controlled and powered by renewable energy, the loop aims to connect communities, reduce reliance on cars, and promote healthier lifestyles.as one of dubai’s most forward thinking projects, the loop will bring people closer to work, leisure, and living spaces all while aligning with the city’s vision for a greener, smarter future.for residents and investors, the loop represents more than just infrastructure; it’s a lifestyle upgrade that adds long term value to nearby communities and developments.the loop dubai – where sustainability, connectivity, and wellness come together. blogs gold line metro connecting jumeirah garden city to dubai’s future blogs gold line metro connecting jumeirah garden city to dubai’s future dubai’s ambitious gold line metro is set to redefine connectivity, directly linking jumeirah garden city to the city’s dynamic metro network. this landmark project will make travel faster, smarter, and more convenient bringing every corner of dubai within easy reach.at the heart of this transformation is mayfair gardens, jumeirah garden city a modern residential development designed for those who value lifestyle and accessibility. with the gold line metro at its doorstep, mayfair gardens residents will enjoy seamless connectivity to business districts, leisure destinations, shopping hubs, and airports.enhanced accessibility will also uplift property values, strengthen rental potential, and create long-term investment appeal making mayfair gardens a perfect choice for both end users and investors.mayfair gardens – where vibrant living meets unmatched connectivity. blogs blue line metro connectivity boosts dubailand’s future arlington park at the heart of it. blogs blue line metro connectivity boosts dubailand’s future arlington park at the heart of it. dubai’s vision for smart urban mobility continues to take shape with the upcoming blue line metro, a transformative project that will directly connect dubailand to the city’s extensive metro network. this milestone development is set to redefine accessibility, convenience, and value for residents and investors alike.at the center of this progress stands arlington park, dubailand a thoughtfully designed residential community that combines modern living with seamless connectivity. with the blue line metro linking dubailand to key destinations across dubai, future residents of arlington park will enjoy effortless access to business hubs, leisure attractions, educational institutions, and airports all within a short ride.beyond convenience, metro connectivity is expected to significantly enhance property values and rental demand in dubailand, making arlington park a smart choice for both homeowners and investors.as dubai continues to expand sustainably, projects like arlington park are perfectly positioned to benefit from the city’s growth offering a lifestyle of comfort, connectivity, and long-term value.arlington interior design company dubai & uae | crystal fit contracting home about us services portfolio contact us home about us services portfolio contact us home about us services portfolio contact us home about us services portfolio contact us view portfolio building spaces that inspire get your quote commercial fit-outs about us one stop design & build team our services health & wellness designs get in touch premium residential interiors read faq turn key project management view portfolio building spaces that inspire get your quote commercial fit-outs about us one stop design & build team our services health & wellness designs get in touch premium residential interiors read faq turn key project management on-time guarantee 10+ years in uae fit outs 200+ handed over projects approved in uaecontractor what we do crystal fit contracting llc is a dubai-based design & build studio operating across the gcc since 2014. with over a decade of expertise in the local interior fit-out market, we provide a one-stop solution for clients in the commercial, horeca (hotels, restaurants, cafés), residential, and public sectors — delivering projects that prioritize time, quality, and a bespoke business approach. we provide end-to-end design & build solutions, tailored to the needs of each client. read more latest projects roasters specialty coffee dubai hills self.space studio ghoshi city, al quoz, dubai yoy neo bistro restaurant shangri-la hotel, sheikh zaed rd, dubai, uae roasters specialty coffee sobha hartland in the pink stretching studio, cafe dubai hills, dubai, uae livrichy real estate office dubai hills, dubai view portfolio request a proposal contact us faq do you provide warranty or maintenance service? yes. we provide a standard warranty of 1 year on general fit-out works and can offer maintenance packages to ensure long-term performance. are your designs complience with local uae rules and regulations? absolutely. all our projects strictly follow dubai municipality, civil defense, dewa and relevant uae authority regulations. do you guarantee project delivery timelines? yes. we commit to contractualdelivery dates, with structured planning to meet deadlines. also we do have financial responsibilities in front of the client in case of contractor fault delays happened at project. what services does crystal fit contracting offer? we provide end-to-end design and build solutions: commercial interiors, f&b, retail, offices, and residential sectors. how do i get started with crystal fit? simplycontact us with your project requirements. our team will schedule a freeconsultation and site assessment. can you help me select the right unit for my business? yes. we assist clients with site selection by evaluating size towards requirements, unit structure, mep capacity, and complexity of third party approvals and construction processes at selected venue. how do i ensure the project stays within budget? we provide transparent boqs, material specifications, contract agreement that clearly identifying inclusions and exclusions of contractors scope. do you handle authority approvals in dubai? yes. we manage all drawings and approvals, landlord approval, dubai civil defence (dcd), dewa, dda,dha, (dm) dubai municipality, trakhees and other relevant authorities. can you work in emaar, dubai holding, tecom, or other developer projects? yes.we are experienced with leading developers’ standards and have successfullydelivered projects in all major malls and/or landlords. do you offer design-only or build-only services? yes. we can provide full turnkey design & build, or standalone design/build services depending on your needs. trusted by the best contact us let’s talk together suppliers/collaborations/inquiriesclientshr contact +971 (056) 338 62 19 info@crystalfituae.com dubai, al quoz industrial area 3, str.13 c +971 (056) 338 62 19 info@crystalfituae.com dubai, al quoz industrial area 3, str.19 d quick menu about us our designs contact us crystal fit contracting llc. all rights reserved

Permit coordination for nshama
ИСТИНА
Co-living projects in Dubai can lose 3–6 months to permit delays — before a single resident moves in. Luxury villa projects in Dubai can sit idle for 3–6 months waiting for modification permits and NOCs — killing your timeline and margins. ArchiStruct handles all structural, MEP, and architectural documentation plus the complete approval chain with Dubai Municipality, DDA, Trakhees, and community management. interest titans developers titans developers is led by an experienced real estate development team, that have worked in the industry for over a decade. we understand that we don’t just build residential towers or villas, the strength of our business is built on the strong-foundations of excellence in our customer relationships. the city dubai dubai, the middle east’s leading tourism, lifestyle and business destination, is one of the world’s most dynamic city-states, attracting millions of visitors and residents every year. led by the remarkable vision of his highness sheikh mohammed bin rashid al maktoum, ruler of dubai .dubai continues to inspire with bold investments.. dubai sports city dubai sports city or dsc a multi-venue sports complex in dubai, united arab emirates, developed by dubai. it provides a mix of residential, retail, leisure and recreational facilities. it is built around five major sports venues and features a number of sports academies. located on mohammad bin zayed road the residential. our developments hera tower hera tower effortlessly combines modern architecture with design. the building in a mix of studios, one bedroom and two bedroom apartments. hera tower draws its inspiration from the greek goddess, hera, the “queen”. we have embodied this inspiration into the awe-inspiring interior design for the ground-floor lobby of hera tower, that takes its exquisite design from classical greek architecture. learn more show apartment (hera tower) ► explore 3d space hera show apartment sports city affiliated partners spartansmep spartans mep has years of experience in mep services and related engineering fields, which is why we know the necessities for all kinds of buildings. we establish long-lasting works without flaws and minimal maintenance. visit website universal cm universal is a one of the best provider of owners association and property management services in dubai, . for properties owner and developer we provide our clients with professional, expert advice on the establishment…. visit website register your interest office no. 3309, citadel tower business bay dubai, uae +971 4 330 0133 UAE approvals for Evolve Interiors projects
ИСТИНАInternational studios entering Dubai often spend months navigating municipal approvals without a local engineering partner — projects stall before construction even starts.

ArchiStruct manages the full approval chain with Dubai Municipality, DDA, Trakhees, and community management, so your team focuses on design, not bureaucracy.

We helped the Atlantis The Royal project launch in 3 days instead of 3–6 weeks, with 100+ approved projects across Dubai to date.

jubail island - space to grow skip to content menu   ar en inspection & handover booking appointment - property purchase callback - sales & commercial request park activity book aed  0.00 0 cart menu   ar en book inspection & handover booking appointment - property purchase callback - sales & commercial request park activity ar en inspection & handover booking appointment - property purchase callback - sales & commercial request mangrove park activities book watch video jubail island jubail island space to grow. discover bada al jubail where nature meets fine architecture ​ the aed15 billion jubail island master-planned project, developed and managed by lead development, is an idyllic collection of villages located between yas island and saadiyat island and will become abu dhabi’s leading sanctuary,  designed to appeal to wellness and nature enthusiasts, positioned amid the rich biodiversity of the mangroves. the luxury project spans 4,000 hectares, offering wholesome f&b outlets and a wide range of facilities, including a beach club, a business centre, a sports centre, schools, supermarkets, nurseries, marinas, a community club, specialised clinics, and other commercial establishments, and will be home to more than 10,000 residents. discover more the island a stunning refuge minutes away from the bustling city centre offering a breathtaking landscape. discover the lifestyle frequent festivals and events create a vibrant community spirit. discover the properties with each of its villages boasting its own identity and elegant design. discover a haven of exclusive living sprawled across 4,000 hectares of mangrove forests and coastal estuaries with more than 30 km of waterfront, lies jubail island. home to six distinct village communities, with deliberately bespoke, breathtakingly picturesque residential areas and community facilities. contact us book an appointment unique lifestyle villages sprawled across 4,000hectares more than 30km ofwaterfronts drive from downtown abu dhabi interactive map immerse yourself in the remarkable community. get access download brochure marsa al jubail - a new waterfront landmark on jubail island nestled within the vibrant marfaa al jubail, marsa al jubail stands as jubail island’s dedicated marina hub – bringing together the best of yachting, leisure, and personalised hospitality. the destination offers premium yacht berths, exclusive access to yacht club facilities, a dedicated concierge team for tailored arrangements, full yacht provisioning, luxury transport coordination, and seamless hotel and dining reservations. alongside elegant waterfront promenades, upscale dining experiences, and curated lifestyle services, marsa al jubail serves as the social heart of al marfaa – inviting residents and visitors to experience effortless nautical living surrounded by natural beauty and refined coastal charm. discover marsa al jubail spaces that bring the community together jubail island features a carefully planned network of parks, open spaces, and community amenities designed to support an active, balanced, and connected lifestyle. from cycling tracks, kayaking stations, and mangrove boardwalks to community centres, play areas, wellness spaces, sports facilities, and places of worship, these shared spaces encourage outdoor living, social connection, and everyday wellbeing. explore parks & community spaces jubail island’s public arts programme jubail island’s public arts programme is an initiative geared towards enriching the art landscape in abu dhabi, and add the art layer to jubail island and its community. jubail island is proud to play a part in bolstering abu dhabi’s art and culture scene by introducing initiatives that cement the capital’s commitment to arts and culture. an art programme mirroring jubail’s essence will add to the island’s charm and beauty for both residents and visitors alike, spreading a positive impact on the abu dhabi community and the broader uae, whilst creating a legacy for future generations. discover jubail island’s first artwork here. discover jubail island mangrove park jubail island mangrove park is the first self-contained educational, nature and leisure destination of its kind in the emirate of abu dhabi. discover the activities get directions development progress discover jubail island news eco-adventures on jubail island: kayaking the mangroves & wildlife encounters in 2026 26/02/2026 welcome to jubail island, where nature and innovation come together. we are abu dhabi’s first self-contained education, nature, and leisure read more life on jubail island: what a day looks like in abu dhabi’s new nature-first community 12/02/2026 modern life often celebrates speed, height, and constant acceleration. jubail island offers a different definition of progress – one rooted read more buying for the next 20 years: why jubail island is a legacy-style asset 19/01/2026 when we think of real estate investment in the gulf, the conversation often revolves around short-term yield or flipping off-plan read more all posts discover the jubail island mobile app a unique and park rules jubail mangrove park rules this park has access to open water bodies and there are no lifeguards on duty. the park is monitored by cctv 24 hours a day. swimming or diving into the water is not permitted. no pets allowed. no littering. no smoking allowed. no food or beverages allowed on the boardwalk. please do not lean or climb over the railing. toys, skating, the use of scooters and/or bicycles are not permitted in the park. respectful clothing must be considered. all parcels and bags are subject to a security check. items displayed, plants, wildlife must not be touched and/or removed. please do not sit or place children on the railing. children under the age of 18 must be accompanied by an adult at all times during the visit. park representatives reserve the right to remove any persons contravening the above or due to unruly or inappropriate behaviour. disclaimer: guests and their visitors or employees enter and use these premises at their own risk. neither the owners nor their representatives or agents are liable for loss or damage to any guest, visitor, employee or any person’s property, nor for injury or death of any guest, visitor, employee or any person whether such loss or damage to property or injury or death is as a result of the negligence of the owners and or their representatives or agents or not. for myself and for my heirs, personal representatives and assigns, i hereby: 1. acceptance of risks & assumption of responsibility risk i agree to assume responsibility for the risk of the activity, whether identified or not. my participation in the activity is purely voluntary. i assume full responsibility for myself for any bodily injury, accident, illness, paralysis, death, loss or damage to personal property and expenses thereof as a result of my participation in the activity. 2. medical i confirm and warrant that: i have no medical condition (physical or mental) which would/could impact on my ability to participate in the activities provided; [for female participants] i am not pregnant; i am physically able to participate in the activities provided; i am not taking any herbal or medicinal supplements or prescription drugs that could impact on my ability to participate in activities provided. 3. release i release the organizer, their principals, directors, officers, agents, employees and volunteers, and their insurers, from any and all claims of whatever kind, and from any and all liability for any and all injury or damage (including death) as a result of my participation in the activity. 4. emergency treatment consent i agree and consent to the receipt of medical treatment in a medical emergency situation where i may not be capable to consent to such treatment. 5. insurance the undersigned understands that this agreement does not include participant insurance. the undersigned acknowledges that they either have appropriate insurance or, in its absence, agree to pay all cost of rescue and/or medical services as may be incurred on their behalf. 6. property damage the undersigned agrees to pay for any or all damages to any equipment or property caused by the undersigned either negligently, willfully, or otherwise 7. media i consent to the use of my and/or any of my dependent’s images for any and all such purposes, including without limitation video, still photographs, publication, and any trade or advertising purposes. 8. acknowledgment i understand that this release refers to all claim types, including breach of contract, fraud, or any other type of suit and includes losses alleged to be caused by the negligence of the organizer to the fullest extent permitted by law with the exception of gross negligence +971 56 260 7636 +971 2 448 0011 island 7.8 kilometers of pristine beaches 2.7 million sqm of reclaimed land 3 fully operational world-class hotels overview breeze island treasure island dream island view island al marjan island extends a vast 4.5 kilometers into the sea, and covers an area of 2.7 million square meters. located in ras al khaimah, an emirate with a well preserved history, rich archaeological heritage and ancient cultural remnants. explore breeze island, the gateway into the island of al marjan, is a breath of fresh air in the world of luxury and hospitality. with over 2,000 meters of waterfront area, walkway; designed for stress-free living and inspired to nurture your well-being. dream island is a destination like no other! with over 5000 meters of waterfront area, you’ll get to witness the dubai read more why should you hire a design & build firm? dubai being famous for its innovative and exotic designs and builds, visitors from all over the world come here to witness the beauty of mesmerising villas and commercial developments, when buying a new mansion, penthouse, villa, a new office space or a new retail outlet- owners do invest into builders and designers separately to come up with a structure of their own choice. over the period, this strategy has proven to be not so effective as there are often conflicts between the interests of two teams working on the same space. therefore, owners have shifted their interests from opting two different firms to only one design and build firm to work on the entire project on a turnkey basis. this is where experts like us come best holiday homes in dubai: affordable vacation rentals & luxury stays. imagine your perfect stay in dubai, and lux will make it happen. we offer luxury holiday homes and concierge, with unparalleled customer service. from luxury villas on the palm jumeriah to short term holiday home apartments overlooking the burj khalifa, lux has all your vacation rental requirements covered. how it works property inspection our senior advisor will visit your property and evaluate its condition, styling, view, and location. we will then provide you with a calculation unique to your property to determine its potential revenue. see more.. documentation & verification upon submission of the requisite documentation, including the passport, title deed, and dewa green bill, we will initiate the application process for the dubai tourism permit and third-party liability insurance. subsequently, we will facilitate the issuance of the move-in permit and proceed with the registration of the owner’s bank details for future rent payments. additionally, we will document account numbers for utility services such as internet, gas, and cooling, where applicable. see more.. design & enhancement our interior designer will then provide styling options to bring your property up to hotel standard and highlight any upgrade requirements in order to generate the highest possible return on your investment. see more.. photography & marketing your property will then be professionally staged and photographed by our marketing team. we will build an engaging profile and list your property on all major booking channels such as airbnb, expedia, booking.com and more. your property will also be listed with travel agencies, luxury retreats and corporate stay programs to ensure the highest occupancy throughout the year. see more.. guest management our reservations team will provide comprehensive information to guests regarding all facets of the property. this includes coordinating payments, acquiring guest passports , facilitating the upload of passports into dubai tourisms system, confirming arrival times, and addressing any special requests made by the guest. subsequently, our dedicated guest manager will personally meet the guest at the property, oversee the check-in process, facilitate the signing of the reservation contract, collect the deposit, and maintain continuous communication with the guest throughout their stay to ensure a seamless experience to ensure a 5-star review. see more.. our relationship we will provide our hosts with login credentials to our portal, offering detailed information on their property reservations, income, and calendar status. you will be assigned a dedicated manager to attend to all your property needs and ensure consistent communication with you at all times. our commitment to delivering premium service and upholding hotel-standard accommodations will guarantee optimal returns on your investment. we look forward to working with you. see more.. property locations find spaces that suit your style downtown the palm jumeirah dubai marina business bay the bluewaters island jumeirah beach residence emaar beachfront jumeirah lake-towers view all management services housekeeping high standards of cleanliness maintained. fresh linens, towels, and bath products provided after every check-out. reservations management thorough documentation of all confirmed bookings, passports and deposits for all guests. 24/7 check-in guests are warmly welcomed by a lux representative, available around the clock. guest welcome kit complimentary tea, coffee, water, bath products, and cleaning supplies for every guest upon check-in. marketing your property will be listed on all major booking channels (airbnb, booking.com, expedia) as well as with our travel partners. maintenance team proactive maintenance to ensure a hassle-free and well-maintained property. maintain command over your investment. real-time calendar: instantly view reservations and property schedule updates. reservation overview: access detailed booking information effortlessly. income tracking: transparent tracking of property income. check your statements: check your monthly statements and view your detailed payout report. host portal frequently asked questions for guests and property owners what areas are popular for short term? downtown, palm and dubai marina, as these are the most highly trafficked destinations for international and dometic travelers. how much income can i expect to earn from my property? short term generally yields net 15-25% higher returns than the current long term market as of february 2024 depending on the location, styling and view. how long does it take to get my property furnished and online? approximately 2 weeks from the date the move in permit is approved. can i book my property for personal use? yes you can book your property for personal use anytime throughout the year as long as there are no reservations. how far in advance to you take bookings? 90 days in advance is our standard open calendar period. where is the best place to go on holiday in dubai? popular areas like downtown dubai, dubai marina, palm jumeirah, and jbr are among the best places to stay for a holiday in dubai due to their proximity to major attractions, beaches, shopping, and dining. for a more comfortable and flexible stay, booking the best holiday home in dubai is an ideal option, offering more space, privacy, and a home-like experience. view all guest reviews the apartment was exactly as “customer” shall mean any person, firm, company or corporation what so ever trading with the company. the firm order place by the customer should be minimum order value: usd250.00 or aed 1000.00. order less then usd250.00 or aed 1000.00 will not be accepted. the spare parts /goods will be sold to the customer at the price. price is subject to change without prior notice on account of any change in duty, tax, surcharge or levy of any kind. for all wire transfer transaction’s a charge of $35.00 per transaction will be levied. unless otherwise stated the company will levy an a.o.g. service charge of $175.00 per shipment for goods dispatched after normal office hours (09:30 – 18:30 sunday – thursday). we commit our time of delivery as accurately as possible, but is not the subject of any condition, warranty or representation. it is, therefore, subject to extension, but not limited to, for delay due to strikes, lock outs, works breakdown, delay in transit, shortage of materials, government regulations or requirements or any other cause beyond the company control. made to order or special orders placed by the customer can’t be cancelled . if customer cancel’s the order then customer will be liable to reimburse the company for all expenses incurred in the placing and cancellation of the order plus a 25% cancellation fee. the company quotation may contain additional information concerning individual parts or alternate parts offered and it is fully customer’s responsibility to understand the conditions of the quotation prior to placing any firm order. the customer shall be responsible for complying with any legislation or regulations governing the importation of the goods in the country of destination and for the payment of any such duties and the company will not be responsible or entertain any such claim by the customer. return policy & credit we at arrow aviation services fze are proud of our quality products. we strive to make every effort to provide our customers with the most reliable product. however, if a problem develops in a supplied component that requires return, please contact our sales executive. returned material must be accompanied by a copy of the issued original faa8130-3 /easa-form 1 or related paper work with all listed requirements completed. returned goods are subject to a minimum restocking fee of 25% of the purchase price. opened or unsealed items must be recertified and returned to the original condition in which they were shipped. non-warranty recertification charges are the responsibility of the customer. reports of shortages must be made within 7 days of receipt of goods. where delivery is other than in the company’s own transport or carrier, the company shall not in any circumstances be responsible for the loss, damage or destruction of the goods. the customer should in his own interest give notice to and subsequently claim from the carrier as required by the carrier’s regulations. a copy of the notice and claim shall at the same time be sent to the company who (whilst the company cannot accept any responsibility) will give the customer any assistance the company considers appropriate in connection with the proper claim against the carrier. if the customer wishes to return goods purchased from the company then a return goods authorisation form must be obtained from the company. once completed in full the rma should be attached to the original airworthiness documentation (faa form 8130 and/or easa form one) and returned with the goods. goods arriving at the company without a completed rma form will not be considered for credit and 25% of re-stocking will levied on the customer. if any technical defect or company has supplied wrong part against demand part or supplied without faa8130-3 / easa form one , then company is fully liable to give a full credit to customer and customer can return the unit to company for full credit. requests to return goods for credit must be made within 15 days from date of dispatch from company and be accompanied by the company’s rma form. and to be returned at the customer’s entire expense including prepaid freight and customs charges. the company reserves the right to charge a restocking fee for items correctly supplied but subsequently returned for credit. re-stocking / handling charges are 25% of the invoice value on items supplied . recertification charges may also be applicable if the item has been removed from its original sealed bag and/or if the original airworthiness documentation is not returned. any special made to order items for the customer and dispatched by the company are non refundable and no credit will be issued for such items. exchange agreement goods offered for a component exchange transaction are offered as ‘normal exchange’. in this exchange, you agree to return an acceptable core unit to arrow aviation services fze within 15-20 days after the date of the invoice. core not received on or before the due date will be invoiced a daily late charge of 2% of the core charge price. the core unit must be guaranteed economically repairable and able to be certified to the condition of the original exchange unit arrow aviation services fze provides to you. in the event that your unit cannot be economically recertified, you agree to one of the following options. 1) share in any excessive repairs cost in addition to the original exchange fee. 2) pay the stated core charge in addition to the exchange fee and have your unit returned as your property or scrapped at overhaul agency premises/shop. 3) supply an acceptable substitute core for evaluation and pay the evaluation fee of the unit being returned. 4) if the failed unit is found to have a no verifiable problem , the customer will be charged a minimum of $450.00 to rectify the returned unit. 5) the customer agrees to pay all attorney fee should litigation become necessary to enforce this agreement. to be guaranteed economically repairable: the cost to repair/overhaul the core must not exceed 70% of the original exchange price. all cores must be returned to arrow aviation services fze within the time stated above in order to avoid any additional billing. all cores must have documentation tracing the unit to an faa approved source and a “non-incident” statement. failure to provide this information may result in the non-acceptance of the core and result in the outright billing of the core value. core return terms & condition the core unit required to complete the exchange must be returned to the company within 15-20 days from the date of dispatch of the serviceable component. if the core be received by the company after this period then a late return fees equivalent to 15% of the outright sale price per month may be charged, unless agreed previously by the company. the core trace form which must be completed to ensure traceability of the returned core, is supplied with the serviceable component. core units received at the company without the completed traceability will not acceptable. failure to provide trace form the core will be returned to the customer and charged additionally for outright sale as well as invoiced for the freight charges for returning the core. the serviceable exchange unit supplied will be correct to part number and complete. please ensure that the core is in the same complete state. any items found to be missing from the returned exchange core will be charged additionally. payment terms & condition payments are payable in the name of arrow aviation services fze. the customer undertakes to pay for all goods or services supplied by the company within 30 days from the date of invoice. failure to settle outstanding payments within the company’s specified period can result in the company withdrawing the customer’s credit account facilities and taking legal action to recover the overdue amounts and any interest on the outstanding balance. all the supplied spare parts / goods remain the property of the company until unless customer has paid for it in full. warranty terms & conditions the company warrants any new item to be free from defects in material or workmanship for a period of 12 months from date of dispatch from oem or supplier . for overhaul condition item to be free from defects in material or workmanship for a period of 06 months from date of dispatch factory or supplier or any serviceable or repair item to be free from defects in material or workmanship for a period of 03 months from date of dispatch factory or supplier . the warranty covers any serviceable rotable supplied by the company, irrespective of its tagged condition, providing that the company is notified within 7 days of discovery of any defect and that the defective item is returned together with a fully completed returned material authorisation form. the warranty period for any repaired or replaced part is limited to the unexpired period of the original warranty provided and not from the date of the replacement. where goods supplied by the company are alleged by the customer to be defective or unsatisfactory they shall not form the subject of any claim for work done by or on behalf of the customer, or for any loss, damage or expense whatsoever arising directly or indirectly from such defect or unsatisfactory work. such goods, if returned to the company and accepted by the company as defective, having taken into account the preceding clauses, shall either be repaired or replaced by the company or credit for the price or part thereof will be given to the customer. warranty replacement units are charged at the original supply price and should the claim be accepted then credit will be issued against the invoice for the replacement part. the company will not liable of all obligations under this warranty if: the unproven defect in the part is due to misuse or negligence on the part of someone other than the company or the repair facility that the claim is on. the company identification mark, name or serial number has been removed from the part in question. if the part is damaged as the result of another component in the aircraft being faulty. if the testing procedure is outside the parameters laid down by the component’s o.e.m. terms & conditions please read these terms & conditions insure secure online payment and all other transactions of personal data, the website uses a technology called ssl (secure socket layer). ssl encrypts all communications between your computer and our server so that the information can only be read and understood by us. usually a closed lock on your browser window shows a secure connection. for further information, please consult your browser’s security specifications. if your browser is equipped with ssl your transaction will automatically be secured. the common standard in the internet to signal a secure site is a closed lock at the bottom of the browser. as long as the lock is displayed closed your information is secure and encrypted to avoid abuse. if you click the secure transaction link and still cannot see the closed lock, the will issue cookies when you direct your browser to our website. flash cookies. certain features of our website may use local stored objects (or flash cookies) to collect and store information about your preferences and navigation to, from and on our website. flash cookies are not managed by the same browser settings as are used for browser cookies. web beacons. pages of our website and our e-mails may contain small electronic files known as web beacons (also referred to as clear gifs. pixel tags and single-pixel gifs) that permit the company, for example, to count users who have visited Permit coordination for oriental pearls
ИСТИНАLuxury villa projects in Dubai can sit idle for 3–6 months waiting for modification permits and NOCs — killing your timeline and margins.

ArchiStruct handles all structural, MEP, and architectural documentation plus the complete approval chain with Dubai Municipality, DDA, Trakhees, and community management.

We launched Atlantis The Royal in 3 days vs. the standard 3–6 weeks, with 100+ approved projects in Dubai and fixed pricing from day one.

Would you be open to a 10-minute call to discuss fast-track permits for Oriental Pearls' next development?		Permit coordination for oriental pearls

UAE approvals for design hub projects
ИСТИНАInternational studios entering Dubai often spend months navigating municipal approvals without a local engineering partner — projects stall before construction even starts.

ArchiStruct manages the full approval chain with Dubai Municipality, DDA, Trakhees, and community management, so your team focuses on design, not bureaucracy.

We helped the Atlantis The Royal project launch in 3 days instead of 3–6 weeks, with 100+ approved projects across Dubai to date.

eight development, every project begins with one key decision — the location. we meticulously select each site, knowing that where you live defines how you live. for us, location isn’t just a detail — it’s the foundation of long-term value, lifestyle, and architectural meaning. visual we work on every interior detail in our homes. we select tactilely pleasing materials for decoration and creatively approach design solutions in common areas. the architectural process is at the heart of every project we create. we strive to design spaces that go beyond concrete and walls — spaces that carry meaning, emotion, and identity. every line, form, and material is chosen to create a visual narrative that speaks to those who live within it. architecture lobby each lobby we create is a standalone concept — a unique piece of art that sets the tone for the entire building. we collaborate with world-renowned brands such as tom dixon, cassina, lalique, lasvit, b&b italia, and minotti to craft spaces that inspire from the very first step inside. we don’t just build residences — we create thoughtful communities united by shared values and lifestyles. each project is infused with a clear concept and deeper purpose, attracting like-minded individuals who appreciate design, quality, and intentional living. community smells we take care of light and unique fragrances that spread through the home. they are created in collaboration with perfumers so that each mr.eight guest enjoys the fragrances, opens them from their side and enjoys being reminded of them when away from home. balance we do everything to make sure that in our buildings visitors forget all their everyday problems and enjoy their time. company news class over glamour: the subtle revolution in dubai’s luxury real id 18088437956079794 follow on instagram faqs what sets ahmadyar developments apart from other developers? what sets ahmadyar developments apart is a strategic, future-focused approach blending market insight with precise execution to deliver projects that offer long-term value. as one of the emerging real estate developers in dubai, we are committed to delivering well-planned developments that align with modern lifestyles and long-term investment goals. do you follow any specific design principles? yes, our design principles are shaped by how people live and invest today. at ahmadyar developments, we focus on efficiency, smart use of space, and clean, modern aesthetics. each project is guided by a unified concept where architecture, interiors, and amenities work together to support both lifestyle needs and long-term value. can you tell me about your commitment to sustainability? our commitment to sustainability is built into the way we design, build, and plan. from efficient layouts to smart technologies and material choices, we aim to create developments that are environmentally conscious and built for the future. quick links home our legacy our developments palatium residences vestoria bay off plan properties offplan projects in dubai island apartments for sale communities media center contact us follow us address suite 701 & 706, park heights square 2 - Permit coordination for ahmadyar developments
ИСТИНАLuxury villa projects in Dubai can sit idle for 3–6 months waiting for modification permits and NOCs — killing your timeline and margins.

ArchiStruct handles all structural, MEP, and architectural documentation plus the complete approval chain with Dubai Municipality, DDA, Trakhees, and community management.

We launched Atlantis The Royal in 3 days vs. the standard 3–6 weeks, with 100+ approved projects in Dubai and fixed pricing from day one.

home | my site top of page villa sapphire villa sapphire from the founder billy johnson villa sapphire, with handover set for q1 2026, marks our entry into dubai’s luxury market with the same standards that defined three decades of work in london’s most demanding residential sector. ​ since 1992, we have built our reputation on london’s most significant commissions, delivering the fit-out for the two most expensive penthouse apartments ever sold at the peninsula hotel and bvlgari hotel. these projects didn’t establish our standards. they proved them. now, we bring that precision to the uae. villa sapphire is where proven execution meets dubai’s most prestigious address. ​ located on palm jumeirah’s crown frond, villa sapphire is the first of five properties we are developing to the highest specification available in the market. our reputation was built where tolerance for imperfection doesn’t exist. every detail, every surface, every finish reflects one principle: excellence is measurable, not negotiable. ​ our design, management, and construction teams operate to a single standard, the one we’ve always held. villa sapphire is that standard realised in dubai’s most cityview developments | innovating property development in the uae about us portfolio news & media contact us  +971 56 301 9119 we design homes that are not just strategically placed, but are the center of your experience. vision to be renowned for contemporary developments that offer distinctive and dynamic living experiences. mission to create exceptional developments through intelligent design, strategic locations, and a commitment to quality. cityview delivers vibrant communities that meet the evolving needs of urban living. headquartered in the uae, cityview developments boasts a global footprint exceeding 6 million square feet, reflecting its strategic growth and international reach. { the role of the architect, or any creative person, is to make space for those who have no voice. daniel libeskind { we must learn to live with nature, rather than against it. richard rogers { innovation is an evolutionary process, so its not necessary to be radical all the time. marc newson { i believe that the way people live can be directed a little by architecture. tadao ando { there is no separation between architecture and nature; there is a connection. toyo ito { i call architecture frozen music. johann wolfgang von goethe { a house is a machine for living in. le corbusier { simplicity is the ultimate sophistication. leonardo da vinci { as an architect, you design for the present, with an awareness of the past, for a future which is essentially unknown. norman foster { the work of an architect today is complex and diverse. it reflects a world that has changed, and it must address the challenges of that change. zaha hadid projects . current project hyde residences estimated completion: q1 2027    payment plan: 50/50   1/2/3 bedroom apartments   dubai hills current project velos residence motor city upcoming project downtown upcoming project meydan horizon × coming soon... trusted partnership register your interest  phone number +971 56 301 9119 wed love to share more with you, please complete this form and our dedicated team will get back to you shortly. select project were excited to connect with you! +971 56 301 9119 [email protected] home portfolio privacy policy about us news & media t & c   sitemap © 2025 cityview. all rights reserved.
UAE approvals for cityview projects
ИСТИНАInternational studios entering Dubai often spend months navigating municipal approvals without a local engineering partner — projects stall before construction even starts.

ArchiStruct manages the full approval chain with Dubai Municipality, DDA, Trakhees, and community management, so your team focuses on design, not bureaucracy.

We helped the Atlantis The Royal project launch in 3 days instead of 3–6 weeks, with 100+ approved projects across Dubai to date.

igo website watch video . home about sectors projects news contact us 05 contact about us welcome to the invest group overseas invest group overseas is a leading investment and property development company with an extensive portfolio of delivered premium properties. we are renowned for our unrivaled ability to identify and capitalize on business opportunities in developed and emerging markets, which has seen us become one of the top investment companies in the middle east.  our team of experts works tirelessly to source and develop projects that offer exceptional returns for our investors. in addition, we pride ourselves on our customer service and after-sales care, which has resulted in many happy clients who continue to invest with us time and time again.  our forward-thinking approach has allowed us to achieve sustainable growth and create value for our investors. we are committed to excellence and delivering superior returns for our partners. our success is rooted in our strong track record, sound strategy, and deep understanding of the markets we operate in. learn more the vision were on a mission to deliver superior returns for our investors our mission to be a opportunities, and it is this expertise that has made the company one of the most respected names in the industry. excellent portfolio. the company’s portfolio includes a wide range of properties in prime locations across the world. commitment. with a commitment to excellence, igo is the perfect partner for anyone looking to profit from the immense potential of developed and emerging markets. team our leadership our team of experts is led by some of the most experienced and successful professionals in the industry. with decades of experience in investment and property development, our leadership has been instrumental in the growth and success of invest group overseas. mr. moafaq al gaddah chairman “i believe that success belongs to those who dare to dream first, then set a plan and finally work on realizing this plan and objectives.  since the beginning in 1978, we have been exploring ourselves by adding new essential values such as straightforwardness, integrity, creativity and innovation as well as expertise and quality. these values have become a part of the group’s concepts since the outset.   with these same values we continued growing in all the different sectors we operate in, the commercial, real estate, service and construction sector.  everyone has the right to dream, but in order to transform this dream into reality, we need enterprises and human potential able to weave the threads of these expertise, ideas and information together and transform them into a texture called “mag group”. from this, invest group overseas (igo) was born, the dubai-based property developer, mag property development’s sister company and part of the mag group of companies.  dr. mhd anas a. kozbari managing partner & ceo “the immense success of igo to date comes from the core values that myself and mr. moafaq al gaddah held when we first embarked on business together in 2004. the upmost regard for top quality product, a strong business code of ethics and an eagerness to build a global footprint with a different approach to business, has led us to where we stand today. 18 years on, we are now an industry leading investment and property development company, well respected both regionally and widely across the globe.  throughout the years, igo has developed an extensive and impressive portfolio of premium projects that span across several industries, including real estate, fitness and f&b; all of which have exceeded initial expectations and surpassed any assumed results for our invested clients.  a truly significant milestone to myself and igo is our rapid growth into the north american market. launching our largest, $500 million mega-project, the gate by igo. our team our projects igo on photos dubai islands is an elegant archipelago, fast becoming synonymous with luxury lifestyles and high-class hospitality… dubai islands is an elegant archipelago, fast becoming synonymous with luxury lifestyles and high-class hospitality… view more our strong rental rates. with a population exceeding 10 million residents, around 85–90% of whom are expatriates, and more than 18 million international visitors to dubai in 2025, rental demand remains strong and is supported by continued population growth. 02. buy for resale the uae real estate market continues to demonstrate resilient growth. in 2025, dubai residential prices increased by approximately 15–20% in key segments, with villas significantly outperforming apartments. property values in prime locations are now well above previous historical peaks and continue to outperform group of holdings naseeb group of holdings is an association of companies all owned by the naseeb family. since 1982, their empire originated with a small manufacturing company, producing baked goods for renown distribution networks. fast forward to today, our group of holdings have entered over 8 sectors of business with their well-established companies that have been created from the ground-up, with sectors such as trading, agriculture, food & beverage, hospitality, fashion, property development and more. we work together with our hard working team that shares the same beliefs as us. with such knowledgable, tenacious individuals working amongst us, we have been able to make the strides we have in our various industries. we understand that the road to success is not simple to navigate. however, with passion, hard work and determination, we believe anything is possible. it is this same belief that brought us to where we are today. work with us and see the difference when you choose naseeb group of holdings. info@naseebgroup.com +1-905-604-4066 infin8 brands who we are infin8 brands has been in business since 2000 and is a reputableimporter and exporter based in markham, ontario, canada. we are acanadian-owned company and have established successful brands suchas r’ home décor, thermotastic, baker’s tip and confectionary brandssuch as gummy rush, britain gummy and marsh&marlow. in addition,we deal with a variety of commodities such as seasonal goods, home andbaking tools, apparel, confectionary and other consumer goods. with ourvast scope of inventory, we aim to provide products that enhance thequality of life and contribute to a healthier future for your home, family,and lifestyle. values & mission since our inception, we have remained true to our core values and mission, and promise to deliver the following to each of our customers: to work hard to provide our customers with the best deals available to hold ourselves to the highest standard with our exceptional customer service to sell quality products to better your way of living to follow through with our word and satisfy our customers our promise we believe that the success of our customers is our own success. as an importer and exporter, we differentiate ourselves through our facilities, people and customer service. we believe that our deep-rooted purpose, values and principles should be shared globally, which is why we conduct business not only across north america but also internationally, including markets such as russia, middle east and africa. with our successfully established structure and system, our promise is to deliver on every commitment we make, and to share our values all around the world. confectionary it’s our new line of gummy confectionery made with love, and the tastiest ingredients around! our products are free from the top 10 common allergens, making itegg-free, fish-free, soy-free, milk and casein-free, wheat-free,shellfish-free, peanut-free, sesame-free, tree nut-free and gluten-free.our gummies are 100% halal, cholesterol-free, fat-free, and containall-natural fruit juice, ensuring a tasty and safe treat for you and yourloved ones. our delicious gummy varieties include atomic peaches, berry bliss, bluesharks, cola bottles, baby bottles, fizzy cherries, gummy bears,gummy unicorns, gummy worms, neon worms, tiny turtles and sourparty mix. if you’re in the mood for a sugar rush, reach for a bag of gummy rush! our sour straps are proudly vegan, halal, and non-gmo, with no artificialcolors in sight. plus, they’re free from the top 7 allergens: egg-free,fish-free, shellfish-free, soy-free, milk-free, sesame-free, andpeanut-free making them a safe and delightful choice for everyone. you can’t go wrong with our delicious range of flavors, so come and seefor yourself why we’re “sweetening life everyday!” home goods thermotastic is a brand that creates products with consistent quality and reliable performance. our brand ensures to keep your food and beverages to your preference and to the temperature you want, whether it may be cool or warm! our products include glass tea pots, flasks, food jars, kettles, picnic baskets, lunch bags and more when we say there is no place like r home, we truly mean it. r home decor is a one-stop solution for all your decor needs. from wall decals to canvases to frames, we have everything you will need to beautify your room. our products include household items such as canvases, frames, storage bins, curtain rods, wall decals and more! bakers tip is a brand that is known for its top quality kitchenware and bake wareproducts. it’s a brand you can trust. baker’s tip products are not only durably built but are also chic in appearance and complement any kitchen setup. our products include bbq products, cookware, knives, flasks, pans, colour pan sets, children’s cutlery, kitchen utensils, woks, glassware and more. jvc soy integrated production with our accomplished global brands, our group of holdings continues to evolve. with our experience and knowledge, we have entered uzbekistan’s agricultural sector, accommodating to the demand for soybean farming and a soybean factory that produces animal feed, soybean oil and organic fertilizer. our accrued team with over 105 years of agricultural experience have constructed and executed elaborate plans for our farming and machinery requirements, required staff which creates local employment opportunities, soybean processing arrangements and more. with our optimal operations taking place, significant soybean growth and processing has been forecasted for the next few years, and will help jv canadian soy integrated production flourish locally and internationally. döner & gyros döner & gyros is a casual fast food restaurant that serves healthy, delicious and affordable products. we take traditional sandwiches and give them an urban and modern twist. we bring authentic street food from berlin and chicago for all to enjoy. our promise is to always provide a fresh and innovative variation of a street food that is both guilt-free and customized to the consumer’s desires. we focus on providing high quality products that have authentic traditional tastes in every bite. our passion for hospitality brought forth a vision of becoming a premium casual restaurant chain that offers value-added, nutritious, wholesome meals to the masses across the globe. we strive to be the best in value, customer service, employee satisfaction and consistent, sustainable growth. our live station allows our customers to have the freedom in the choice of sandwich style, sauces and the ingredients of their meal. this provides an innovative twist to the whole dining experience. at döner & gyros, we’re no stranger to hard work. our success and determination comes from the dedicated brains behind the brand. from our coo to our operations team to our training manager and marketing team, our management team brings the best experience to döner & gyros from a to z. with an accumulated 143 years worth of experience within the food, beverage and hospitality industry, our enthusiastic team strives everyday as a unit to ensure that our brand aims to excel and continue our international success globally. fashion blackbox global luxury group is a leading luxury group specializing in the manufacture and distribution of exclusive designer and contemporary brands with a recognizable positioning in the global high-end segment. a team with decades of speciality experience in the luxury accessories industry, we know every facet of this market and have applied knowledge to our vision. with over 500+ worldwide points of sales, 4 operational hubs and operating in over 20 countries, blackbox glg is redefining luxury, one step at a time. koenig 74 as blackbox glg’s debut brand, koenig 74 aims to make an impact, and crafting everlasting watches and timepieces with the most luxurious materials available is the way to do it. with vast german experience and knowledge, a brilliant eye for design and a determined drive, koenig 74 has crafted alluring varieties of timepieces for all walks of life. whether it may be casual, sophisticated, athletic or electrifying, we have something for everyone. each of our professionally crafted watches and timepieces make bold statements and will definitely garner the right attention, no matter the occasion. elie saab elie saab is a globally acknowledged and renowned haute couture brand of today. as an international fashion house specialized in haute couture dress making and bridal gowns with fine craftsmanship, esg is now globally synonymous with luxury and modernity, and runs offices in beirut, paris and london. established in beirut, lebanon in 1982 at the age of 18, he opened his very first couture atelier in beirut managing over dozens of employees. in the following months, he presented his first collection to a public of women. fast forward to today, elie saab has its headquarters in beirut, working with notable clients and projects to not only further is brand but to etch his name in haute couture history. every elie saab creation offers a fairy-tale and dream-like reality at first sight. the key features that distinguish elie saab from other brands is their ability to transform even the simplest designs into sophisticated, radiant and royalty by utilizing the finest resources available. in collaboration with blackbox glg’s master craftsmanship and elie saab’s artistry and ingenuity, they have prepared a stunning line of mesmerizing swiss timepieces to perfectly embellish any facet of fashion. with these stellar timepieces prepared, naseeb group holdings have also received the exclusive master licensee for the elie saab timepieces globally. in addition to this astronomical partnership, the elie saab monoboutique will open its doors at one of the most iconic malls of the world, the nakheel mall in dubai, uae. selling the most stylish timepieces, sunglasses, fragrances, leather goods and accessories and more, the elie saab monoboutique is sure to leave a lasting impression into the world of fashion in the middle east. daniel hechter daniel hechter launched in 1962 fashion, making its debut on the catwalk and then in the shops of paris. in an era of high heels and beehive hairdos, this was nothing short of a minor sensation, and the designer had pulled off a new fashion statement. he put into practice his idea of making fashion an everyday event with individually combinable creations for women who were looking to express their personal style. the french designer shaped the style of an entire epoch, including mens fashion and the creation of a lifestyle in the “savoir vivre” spirit of the time, which translates to “know how to live”. the brand was able to launch their first men’s collection in 1968, and fast forward to today, daniel hechter operates in over 3200 pos in 65 countries, such as france, jordan, china, germany, argentina, australia and more. when customers purchase daniel hechter, they know they’re not just buying a high-quality fashion brand; they’re getting to wear an expression. daniel hechter represents youthfulness in mind and spirit, confidence, sophistication, smart and casual. in collaboration with blackbox glg, daniel hechter’s newest line of watches will surely captivate the hearts of many with their stunning debut. naseeb group holdings have the exclusive master licensee for the outstanding timepieces globally. property development naseeb group holdings have established north 43 as our property development sector. the name north 43 has been inspired from toronto, canada’s geographical coordinates. north 43 development have always integrated extravagance with daily living. designed for comfort and luxury, north 43 has worked closely with luxury italian brands to provide elegant contemporary living spaces, designed efficiently to create the perfect balance of style and comfort. our luxurious interior finishing and furnishing set us apart from the rest. italian porcelain tiles, marble and oak floors along with italian furniture will create the perfect essence of modern and contemporary style, constructing beautiful villas and townhouses in canada since 2001 north 43 is bringing their experience from canada and have developed a g+5 floor , 98 apartment mix of studio ,one bed two bed ,and three bedrooms apartments project by the name of platinum residence located in jumeirah village circle, dubai in 2018 completed and handover north 43 development continued on to develop 20 floors of luxury and comfort in the form of the north 43 service residences, 229 apartment mix of studio ,one bed ,two bed, three bedroom apartments also situated in jvc dubai and will be finished and ready for handover q1 2024. download profile naseeb food industries established in kabul back in 1982, naseeb food industries has been producing bakery products and baked goods such as corn chips and packaged cakes. through our large well-established distribution network, we market ourselves through most cities in the country of afghanistan and supply our products at the best prices available. fast forward to today, our delicious products have been well-received and have allowed us to devise major expansion plans consisting of creating potential franchising opportunities, commercial production and introduction of major international food brands in afghanistan. feasibility studies have assisted us in devising a plan on developing a product line for potato chips, biscuits and chocolates in the near future. our goal is to provide a high quality and delicious product to the people of afghanistan with minimal financial strain, and with the employment opportunities created by this endeavor, naseeb food industries is giving back to the country of afghanistan in ways beyond your run-of-the-mill bakery. group timeline 1982 1 naseeb food industries 2000 www.infin8brands.com2 infin8 brands 2005 3 north 43 2005 www.thermotastic.ca4 thermotastic maclean our leadership mission & vision jcm group tangent hospitality maclean metal industriess goals work value production facilities quality management health & safety procedure certifications callback {{ slides[current].caption }} welcome to jc maclean jc maclean international fzco has been established in jebel ali free zone, dubai, united arab emirates (uae) since 1997. jc maclean international has emerged as a leader in the interior fit-out industry offering services of high-end interior fit-out works, loose furniture and soft furnishing. jc maclean international is proud to have successfully executed a wide spectrum of prestigious projects including five-star hotels, shopping malls, and royal palaces both in the uae and outside the uae. 0 years of leadership 0 projects completed 0 clients 0 million project value chairwoman dr. asma mana saeed al otaiba dr. asma mana saeed al otaiba is a distinguished abu dhabi-born uae national with a prolific academic pedigree. having attained a phd, a master’s, and dual bachelor’s degrees from premier local universities, she exemplifies scholarly rigor and intellectual dedication. currently, she exercises executive stewardship as ceo across several vital economic sectors, including government services, healthcare, it, and tourism. simultaneously, she serves as a senior manager at one of the world’s leading big four audit firms, merging fiscal expertise with high-level operational strategy. her multifaceted career reflects a deep commitment to national prosperity, balancing rigorous consultancy with transformative leadership to drive excellence throughout the regions diverse economic landscape. role: chairwoman, owner, guarantor and final authority at jc maclean vice chairman mr. yousuf al naabi as vice chairman, yousuf al naabi brings a level of academic rigor that’s hard to match, including an mba earned with distinction. he’s built a career navigating the complexities of contracting and the demanding oil and gas industry. beyond the technical requirements of the industrial sector, he’s also a seasoned expert in real estate management. it’s a versatile skill set that allows him to oversee diverse portfolios with a sharp eye for detail. think of him as the steady hand that keeps large-scale projects on track. whether he’s managing industrial operations or strategic property investments, he uses his deep operational knowledge to turn complicated challenges into clear, successful outcomes. role: vice chairman, owner, responsible for approving large projects, strategic partnerships co-founder mr. mouhamad dieng mouhamad dieng is a seasoned principal with specialized expertise in geomatics, cartography, and corporate governance. following his academic tenure in russia, he established mir holding, overseeing a diverse portfolio spanning infrastructure, financial technology, and various trade sectors. noted for his civic commitment, he founded the mouhamed rassoul dieng foundation to provide capital for critical medical mandates and social initiatives. his strategic foresight has catalyzed high-impact projects, aligning technical innovation with philanthropic goals. through his stewardship, he continues to drive institutional growth while advocating for community welfare, solidifying his standing as a leader committed to industrial rigor and societal progress. role: co-founder, strategic partnerships chief executive officer mr. harinder s arya harinder arya is a veteran project director who’s spent years mastering the entire lifecycle of massive capital projects. he’s navigated the high stakes of oil and gas, power utilities, and complex construction with a steady hand. one of his standout achievements was leading the strategic acquisition of jc maclean and guiding their expansion into saudi arabia. it’s one thing to run a project, but it’s another to scale an entire business into a new territory successfully. under his guidance, the firm has climbed the ranks to become a premier name in the large-scale fit-out sector. he’s essentially turned standard practice into a benchmark for the rest of the industry, ensuring the company doesnt just grow, but leads the way in quality and execution. role: chief executive officer featured projects some of our completed projects, explore all of our completed and ongoing projects on our projects page. see all emirates palace hotel the ritz-carlton abu dhabi, grand canal st. regis hotel hilton riyadh hotel & residences rosewood hotel park regis krin kin hotel services we specialize in a range of services from interior works for your home or business. {{ current_service.post_title }} {{ current_service.post_excerpt }} read more {{ service.post_title }} gallery see of systems and procedures of quality control/quality assurance to ensure the quality standards are met. read more jc maclean international fzco quick links home about jc maclean message from ceo our khoory in 2012, a culturally driven design-led studio believes in the importance of context and the power of the locus to inform its design process and architecture.   combining a clear and elegant vision of pure rational form and spatial quality, we seek to instill in every aspect of our work an uncompromising dedication to quality. functionality, durability and comfort are prime components within an architectural language that is aesthetic but resists fashion and trends, employing where possible locally sourced materials and products. we seek to produce architecture that increases the quality of life for the occupant and end-user, that is timeless and environmentally sensitive. people hani fallaha partner hamad khoory partner omar al omari partner deena fakhro design director roger fitout+32Click to run19Design
stellar concepts toggle navigation home about us projectsarchitecture interior residential client list contact us 01 / 03 where every detail matters. view services 02 / 03 impeccable design unmatched detail. view projects 03 / 03 perfection in every line. contact us what we do passion fueled services view services 01 interiors 02 architecture 03 furniture 04 construction where vision meets hospitality design excellence unique perspective at stellar concepts, we combine creative vision, technical expertise, and uncompromising standards to craft outstanding and memorable designs that are visually appealing, exceptionally reliable, and deliver extraordinary results. thus, this brings a unique and innovative perspective to every project. it implies creative foresight, strategic planning, and a focus on realizing ambitious goals and ideas for each and every project. 01 hospitality interior holiday inn al barsha 02 hospitality interior sheraton mall of the emirates hotel 03 residential berkeley place 04 residential belgrove residences 05 residential the crestmark 06 architecture private residence 07 architecture private residence 08 architecture private residence how we work proven process for the best result. 1 pre-concept phase during this phase, we focus on understanding the client’s requirements and the projects current status. this information forms the foundation upon which the design will be developed, ensuring alignment with the client’s vision, project goals, and practical considerations. 2 concept phase we develop the projects concept, focusing on establishing the mood that defines the overall feel and intent of each space. this step involves translating the client’s vision into cohesive design ideas, ensuring that the ambiance and functionality align with the projects goals. this is shown through mood imagery, color scheme direction and the ambiance for the project. 3 schematic phase we create visual representations of the design, 3d renderings, and layouts, to provide a clear picture of the envisioned spaces. additionally, material boards are developed to showcase proposed finishes, textures, and colors, allowing clients to better visualize the space and make informed decisions about the design elements. 4 design development in this phase, we refined the design into detailed drawings and specifications. during this phase, we integrate input from other consultants ensuring the design is consistent and aligned with the technical requirements of the project. this collaborative approach ensures that both the aesthetic and functional aspects of the design are seamlessly incorporated into the projects overall framework. 5 tender phase the tender phase is focused on preparing the project for procurement. during this phase, we develop the bill of quantities (boq) and compile a comprehensive tender package, enabling the client to issue the project for tender. we also assist the client throughout the tender process by reviewing submitted tenders, evaluating them against project criteria, and addressing any requests for information (rfis) from bidders. this ensures that the tendering process is clear, competitive, and aligned with the projects requirements 6 post contract phase the post-contract phase focuses on ensuring the seamless implementation of the approved design. during this phase, our designer works closely with the contractor to review shop drawings and material submissions, verifying that they align with the signed-off drawings and specifications. this process ensures that the design intent is accurately translated into the built environment. by maintaining consistent communication and oversight, we help address any discrepancies or adjustments required during construction to achieve the desired outcome. award-winning amazing team with international recognition founder & creative director - dubai cheryll cajandab founder & operations manager - manila napoleon cajandab managing director - china andrew ow business development manager - asia danielle dela cruz expertise milestones that we proudly accomplished & lead us forward. 25+ projects 3 offices manila, dubai, china 5+ years in industry we work with top clients . contact us creative project? let’s have a productive talk. 2025. all rights reserved

UAE approvals for bashta projects
ИСТИНАInternational studios entering Dubai often spend months navigating municipal approvals without a local engineering partner — projects stall before construction even starts.

ArchiStruct manages the full approval chain with Dubai Municipality, DDA, Trakhees, and community management, so your team focuses on design, not bureaucracy.

We helped the Atlantis The Royal project launch in 3 days instead of 3–6 weeks, with 100+ approved projects across Dubai to date.

UAE approvals for LSC projects
ИСТИНАLuxury villa projects in Abu Dhabi can sit idle for 3–6 months waiting for modification permits and NOCs — killing your timeline and margins.

ArchiStruct handles all structural, MEP, and architectural documentation plus the complete approval chain with Dubai Municipality, DDA, Trakhees, and community management.

We launched Atlantis The Royal in 3 days vs. the standard 3–6 weeks, with 100+ approved projects in Dubai and fixed pricing from day one.
